records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Depolarized (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Depolarizing.]

defs: To deprive of polarity; to reduce to an unpolarized condition.
notes: ☞ This word has been inaccurately applied in optics to describe the effect of a polarizing medium, as a crystalline plate, in causing the reappearance of a ray, in consequence of a change in its plane of polarization, which previously to the change was intercepted by the analyzer.

defs: To free from polarization, as the negative plate of the voltaic battery.
